_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Employ credential access TTPs in cyberspace operations.
reference_document_element_description: Implement AI application security controls, including prompt injection defenses, output filtering, access controls, and audit logging.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.386), RC-T-010 (RC, cosine: 0.384).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.4/10 (raw 0.239). Shared vocabulary: [access]. DCWF-only terms [credential, cyberspace, employ, operations, ttps] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, application, audit, controls, defenses, filtering] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.854 (P=0.863, R=0.845). Balanced P/R — the 7-word DCWF element and 16-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.2%). "Employ credential access TTPs in cyberspace operations." and "Implement AI application security controls, including prompt injection defenses," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.389 > STS 0.239 (gap +0.150). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [access] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.8%. Shared tokens: [access]. DCWF-only: [credential, cyberspace, employ, operations, ttps]. WIDAI-only: [ai, application, audit, controls, defenses, filtering].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.150 with low STS 0.239. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
